placeUrls.title: Place URLs
placeUrls.description: Google Maps place URLs to scrape reviews from. Accepts full Google Maps URLs (e.g. https://www.google.com/maps/place/...).

maxReviewsPerPlace.title: Max Reviews Per Place
maxReviewsPerPlace.description: Maximum number of reviews to extract per place. Set to 0 for unlimited.

sortBy.title: Sort Reviews By
sortBy.description: How to sort reviews before extraction.

language.title: Language
language.description: Language code for reviews (e.g. en, es, fr, de, ja). Leave empty for default.

includeOwnerResponse.title: Include Owner Response
includeOwnerResponse.description: Whether to include the business owner's response to each review.

minRating.title: Minimum Rating Filter
minRating.description: Only extract reviews with this star rating or higher (1-5). Set to 1 for all reviews.

maxRunTimeMinutes.title: Max Run Time (Minutes)
maxRunTimeMinutes.description: Gracefully stops the scraper after this many minutes to prevent runaway costs.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Google Maps requires proxies for reliable scraping.
